description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical bottle with a gently contoured neck and a rounded shoulder, made primarily of a light beige or tan material. The bottle features a colorful, printed label that wraps around its midsection, with the front displaying the word 'Guava' in bold white letters on a blue background, along with an image of a guava fruit and the brand name 'GUARAPASILO' in red and white. The label also includes nutritional information and product details on the sides and back, printed in green and yellow tones. The cap is a screw-type closure, decorated with a matching color scheme and fruit imagery. The bottle appears to be filled with a creamy, light-colored liquid, visible through the slightly translucent body. There are no visible signs of damage, and the surface finish is smooth and glossy, typical of glass or high-quality plastic beverage bottles.
description: A light beige, cylindrical bottle with a colorful guava-themed label and a screw cap, filled with a creamy liquid. The front label features the word 'Guava' and fruit imagery, with a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the nutritional information and product details on the label, with the cap and bottle shape clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing part of the guava fruit image and the transition from the back label to the front branding.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main 'Guava' branding, fruit imagery, and the brand name 'GUARAPASILO' prominently.
description_view_3: Side view showing the guava fruit image and the continuation of the label text, with the cap and bottle contours visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label displays 'GUARAPASILO' in red and white, 'Guava' in bold white on blue, and an image of a guava fruit. Side and back labels contain nutritional information and product details in green and yellow. Cap has matching fruit imagery.
